title: OptimizedTacZ
description: Optimization modpack of Timeless and Classics Zero
body:
# Optimization modpack of Timeless and Classics Zero

This modpack provides <u>a great TacZ experience</u> and adds <u>several useful features</u>, so you'll not only experience <u>an increase in FPS over the original TacZ mod</u>, but you'll also be able to <u>play the game more conveniently</u>.

Difference from the original mod:
- Troubleshooting scope blockage (black square around scope)![The scope issue](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/104eed94d178d9f9fa47840d2844f9cadeb62ef8.webp)
- Great performance optimizations
- Added a few other useful mods

This modpack already includes a lot of addons, so you don't need to add anything else.
